characters.name: Washerwoman
characters.description: You start knowing that 1 of 2 players is a particular Townsfolk.

characters.name: Librarian
characters.description: You start knowing that 1 of 2 players is a particular Outsider. (Or that zero are in play)

characters.name: Investigator
characters.description: You start knowing that 1 of 2 players is a particular Minion.

characters.name: Chef
characters.description: You start knowing how many pairs of evil players are neighboring each other.

characters.name: Empath
characters.description: Each night, you learn how many of your 2 alive neighbors are evil.

characters.name: Fortune Teller
characters.description: Each night, choose 2 players: you learn if either is a Demon. There is 1 good player that registers falsely to you.

characters.name: Undertaker
characters.description: Each night*, you learn a character that died by execution today.

characters.name: Monk
characters.description: Each night*, choose a player (not yourself): they are safe from the Demon tonight.

characters.name: Ravenkeeper
characters.description: If you die at night, you are woken to choose a player: you learn their character.

characters.name: Virgin
characters.description: The 1st time you are nominated, if the nominator is a Townsfolk, they are executed.

characters.name: Slayer
characters.description: Once per game, during the day, publicly choose a player: if they are the Demon, they die.

characters.name: Soldier
characters.description: You are safe from the Demon.

characters.name: Mayor
characters.description: If no execution occurs while only 3 players live, you win. If you die at night, another player might die instead.

characters.name: Butler
characters.description: Each night, choose a player (not yourself): tomorrow, you may only vote if they are. You cannot be drunk or poisoned.

characters.name: Drunk
characters.description: You do not know you are the Drunk. You think you are a Townsfolk, but your ability malfunctions.

characters.name: Recluse
characters.description: You might register as evil & as a Minion or Demon, even if dead.

characters.name: Saint
characters.description: If you die by execution, you lose.

characters.name: Poisoner
characters.description: Each night, choose a player: their ability malfunctions tonight and tomorrow day.

characters.name: Spy
characters.description: Each night, you see the Grimoire. You might register as good & as a Townsfolk or Outsider, even if dead.

characters.name: Baron
characters.description: You have no ability. [There are 2 extra Outsiders in play]

characters.name: Scarlet Woman
characters.description: If there are 5 or more players alive & the Demon dies, you become the Demon. (Travellers do not count)

characters.name: Imp
characters.description: Each night*, choose a player: they die. If you chose yourself, you die & a Minion becomes the Imp.

travelers.name: Thief
travelers.description: Each night, choose a player (not yourself); their vote counts negatively tomorrow.

travelers.name: Bureaucrat
travelers.description: Each night, choose a player (not yourself); their vote counts as 3 votes tomorrow.

travelers.name: Gunslinger
travelers.description: Each day, after the 1st vote has been tallied, you may choose a player that voted: they die.

travelers.name: Scapegoat
travelers.description: If a player of your alignment is executed, you might be executed instead.

travelers.name: Beggar
travelers.description: You must use a vote token to vote. If a dead player gives you theirs, you learn their alignment. You are sober & healthy.

first_night_steps.name: Dusk
first_night_steps.description: Check that all eyes are closed. Some Travellers & Fabled act.

first_night_steps.name: Minion Info
first_night_steps.description: If there are 7 or more players, wake all Minions: Show the THIS IS THE DEMON token. Point to the Demon.

first_night_steps.name: Demon Info
first_night_steps.description: If there are 7 or more players, wake the Demon: Show the THESE ARE YOUR MINIONS token. Point to all Minions. Show the THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY token. Show 3 not-in-play good character tokens.

first_night_steps.name: Poisoner
first_night_steps.description: The Poisoner chooses a player.

first_night_steps.name: Spy
first_night_steps.description: Show the Grimoire for as long as the Spy needs.

first_night_steps.name: Washerwoman
first_night_steps.description: Show the Townsfolk character token. Point to both the TOWNSFOLK and WRONG players.

first_night_steps.name: Librarian
first_night_steps.description: Show the Outsider character token. Point to both the OUTSIDER and WRONG players.

first_night_steps.name: Investigator
first_night_steps.description: Show the Minion character token. Point to both the MINION and WRONG players.

first_night_steps.name: Chef
first_night_steps.description: Give a finger signal.

first_night_steps.name: Empath
first_night_steps.description: Give a finger signal.

first_night_steps.name: Fortune Teller
first_night_steps.description: The Fortune Teller chooses 2 players. Nod if either is the Demon (or the RED HERRING).

first_night_steps.name: Butler
first_night_steps.description: The Butler chooses a player.

first_night_steps.name: Dawn
first_night_steps.description: Wait a few seconds. Call for eyes open.

other_night_steps.name: Dusk
other_night_steps.description: Check that all eyes are closed. Some Travellers & Fabled act.

other_night_steps.name: Poisoner
other_night_steps.description: The Poisoner chooses a player.

other_night_steps.name: Monk
other_night_steps.description: The Monk chooses a player.

other_night_steps.name: Spy
other_night_steps.description: Show the Grimoire for as long as the Spy needs.

other_night_steps.name: Scarlet Woman
other_night_steps.description: If the Scarlet Woman became the Imp today, show them the YOU ARE token, then the Imp token.

other_night_steps.name: Imp
other_night_steps.description:
The Imp chooses a player. If the Imp chose themselves:
Replace 1 alive Minion token with a spare Imp token.
Put the old Imp to sleep. Wake the new Imp.
Show the YOU ARE token, then show the Imp token.

other_night_steps.name: Ravenkeeper
other_night_steps.description: If the Ravenkeeper died tonight, the Ravenkeeper chooses a player. Show that player's character token.

other_night_steps.name: Undertaker
other_night_steps.description: If a player was executed today, show their character token.

other_night_steps.name: Empath
other_night_steps.description: Give a finger signal.

other_night_steps.name: Fortune Teller
other_night_steps.description: The Fortune Teller chooses 2 players. Nod if either is the Demon (or the RED HERRING).

other_night_steps.name: Butler
other_night_steps.description: The Butler chooses a player.

other_night_steps.name: Dawn
other_night_steps.description: Wait a few seconds. Call for eyes open & immediately say who died.

characters.name: Clockmaker
characters.description: You start knowing how many steps from the Demon to its nearest Minion.

characters.name: Dreamer
characters.description: Each night, choose a player (not yourself or Travellers): you learn 1 good & 1 evil character, 1 of which is correct.

characters.name: Snake Charmer
characters.description: Each night, choose an alive player: a chosen Demon swaps characters & alignments with you & is then poisoned.

characters.name: Mathematician
characters.description: Each night, you learn how many players' abilities worked abnormally (since dawn) due to another character's ability.

characters.name: Flowergirl
characters.description: Each night*, you learn if a Demon voted today.

characters.name: Town Crier
characters.description: Each night*, you learn if a Minion nominated today.

characters.name: Oracle
characters.description: Each night*, you learn how many dead players are evil.

characters.name: Savant
characters.description: Each day, you may visit the Storyteller to learn 2 things in private: 1 is true & 1 is false.

characters.name: Seamstress
characters.description: Once per game, at night, choose 2 players (not yourself): you learn if they are the same alignment.

characters.name: Philosopher
characters.description: Once per game, at night, choose a good character: gain that ability. If this character is in play, they are drunk.

characters.name: Artist
characters.description: Once per game, during the day, privately ask the Storyteller any yes/no question.

characters.name: Juggler
characters.description: On your 1st day, publicly guess up to 5 players' characters. That night, you learn how many you got correct.

characters.name: Sage
characters.description: If the Demon kills you, you learn that it is 1 of 2 players.

characters.name: Mutant
characters.description: If you are "mad" about being an Outsider, you might be executed.

characters.name: Sweetheart
characters.description: When you die, 1 player is drunk from now on.

characters.name: Barber
characters.description: If you died today or tonight, the Demon may choose 2 players (not another Demon) to swap characters.

characters.name: Klutz
characters.description: When you learn that you died, publicly choose 1 alive player: if they are evil, your team loses.

characters.name: Evil Twin
characters.description: You & an opposing player know each other. If the good player is executed, evil wins. Good can't win if you both live.

characters.name: Witch
characters.description: Each night, choose a player: if they nominate tomorrow, they die. If just 3 players live, you lose this ability.

characters.name: Cerenovus
characters.description: Each night, choose a player & a good character: they are "mad" they are this character tomorrow, or might be executed.

characters.name: Pit-Hag
characters.description: Each night*, choose a player & a character they become (if not in play). If a Demon is made, deaths tonight are arbitrary.

characters.name: Fang Gu
characters.description: Each night*, choose a player: they die. The 1st Outsider this kills becomes an evil Fang Gu & you die instead. [+1 Outsider]

characters.name: Vigormortis
characters.description: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Minions you kill keep their ability & poison 1 Townsfolk neighbor. [-1 Outsider]

characters.name: No Dashii
characters.description: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Your 2 Townsfolk neighbors are poisoned.

characters.name: Vortox
characters.description: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Townsfolk abilities yield false info. Each day, if no-one is executed, evil wins.

first_night_steps.name: Dusk
first_night_steps.description: Check that all eyes are closed. Some Travellers & Fabled act.

first_night_steps.name: Philosopher
first_night_steps.description: The Philosopher might choose a good character. If they did, give them that ability; if that character is in play, that player is drunk.

first_night_steps.name: Minion Info
first_night_steps.description: If there are 7 or more players, wake all Minions: Show the THIS IS THE DEMON token. Point to the Demon.

first_night_steps.name: Demon Info
first_night_steps.description: If there are 7 or more players, wake the Demon: Show the THESE ARE YOUR MINIONS token. Point to all Minions. Show the THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY token. Show 3 not-in-play good character tokens.

first_night_steps.name: Snake Charmer
first_night_steps.description: The Snake Charmer points to a player. If that player is the Demon, swap the Demon's and Snake Charmer's characters and alignments, wake each to show their new role and alignment; the new Snake Charmer is poisoned.

first_night_steps.name: Evil Twin
first_night_steps.description: Wake the Evil Twin and their twin and confirm they acknowledge each other. Show the twin the Evil Twin token and point to the Evil Twin. Show the Evil Twin the twin's character token and point to the twin.

first_night_steps.name: Witch
first_night_steps.description: The Witch points to a player. If that player nominates tomorrow, they die immediately.

first_night_steps.name: Cerenovus
first_night_steps.description: The Cerenovus chooses a player and a good character. Wake the target and show THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU, the Cerenovus token, and the madness character.

first_night_steps.name: Clockmaker
first_night_steps.description: Show the number of steps from the Demon to its nearest Minion.

first_night_steps.name: Dreamer
first_night_steps.description: The Dreamer points to a player. Show 1 good and 1 evil character token; one of these is correct.

first_night_steps.name: Seamstress
first_night_steps.description: The Seamstress either signals 'no', or points to two other players; if they chose players, nod 'yes' or shake 'no' for whether they are the same alignment.

first_night_steps.name: Mathematician
first_night_steps.description: Show the hand signal for the number (0, 1, 2, ...) of players whose ability malfunctioned due to another ability.

first_night_steps.name: Dawn
first_night_steps.description: Wait a few seconds. Call for eyes open.

other_night_steps.name: Dusk
other_night_steps.description: Check that all eyes are closed. Some Travellers & Fabled act.

other_night_steps.name: Philosopher
other_night_steps.description: The Philosopher might choose a good character. If they did, give them that ability; if that character is in play, that player is drunk.

other_night_steps.name: Snake Charmer
other_night_steps.description: The Snake Charmer points to a player. If that player is the Demon, swap the Demon's and Snake Charmer's characters and alignments, wake each to show their new role and alignment; the new Snake Charmer is poisoned.

other_night_steps.name: Witch
other_night_steps.description: If 4 or more players are alive, the Witch points to a player. If that player nominates tomorrow, they die immediately.

other_night_steps.name: Cerenovus
other_night_steps.description: The Cerenovus chooses a player and a good character. Wake the target and show THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU, the Cerenovus token, and the madness character.

other_night_steps.name: Pit-Hag
other_night_steps.description: The Pit-Hag points to a player and a character on the sheet. If that character is not in play, wake that player and show the YOU ARE card and the new character token. If it is in play, nothing happens.

other_night_steps.name: Fang Gu
other_night_steps.description: The Fang Gu points to a player; that player dies. Or, if that player was an Outsider and no other Fang Gu is in play, the Fang Gu dies instead and the chosen player becomes an evil Fang Gu - wake them and show YOU ARE, the Fang Gu token, then YOU ARE EVIL.

other_night_steps.name: No Dashii
other_night_steps.description: The No Dashii points to a player. That player dies.

other_night_steps.name: Vortox
other_night_steps.description: The Vortox points to a player. That player dies.

other_night_steps.name: Vigormortis
other_night_steps.description: The Vigormortis points to a player; that player dies. If a Minion, they keep their ability and one of their Townsfolk neighbors is poisoned.

other_night_steps.name: Barber
other_night_steps.description: If the Barber died today, wake the Demon and show THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU and the Barber token. The Demon either signals 'no' or points to 2 players; if chosen, swap their character tokens and wake each to show their new character.

other_night_steps.name: Sweetheart
other_night_steps.description: Choose a player to be drunk from now on.

other_night_steps.name: Sage
other_night_steps.description: If the Sage was killed by a Demon, point to two players, one of which is that Demon.

other_night_steps.name: Dreamer
other_night_steps.description: The Dreamer points to a player. Show 1 good and 1 evil character token; one of these is correct.

other_night_steps.name: Flowergirl
other_night_steps.description: Nod 'yes' or shake 'no' for whether the Demon voted today, then update the Demon Voted / Demon Not Voted marker.

other_night_steps.name: Town Crier
other_night_steps.description: Give a 'yes' or 'no' for whether a Minion nominated today.

other_night_steps.name: Oracle
other_night_steps.description: Show the hand signal for the number (0, 1, 2, ...) of dead evil players.

other_night_steps.name: Seamstress
other_night_steps.description: If the Seamstress has not yet used their ability, they either signal 'no', or point to two other players; if they chose players, nod 'yes' or shake 'no' for whether they are the same alignment.

other_night_steps.name: Juggler
other_night_steps.description: If today was the Juggler's first day, show the hand signal for the number (0, 1, 2, ...) of correct guesses, then remove the markers.

other_night_steps.name: Mathematician
other_night_steps.description: Show the hand signal for the number (0, 1, 2, ...) of players whose ability malfunctioned due to another ability.

other_night_steps.name: Dawn
other_night_steps.description: Wait a few seconds. Call for eyes open & immediately say who died.

characters.name: Grandmother
characters.description: You start knowing a good player & their character. If the Demon kills them, you die too.

characters.name: Sailor
characters.description: Each night, choose an alive player: either you or they are drunk until dusk. You can't die.

characters.name: Chambermaid
characters.description: Each night, choose 2 alive players (not yourself): you learn how many woke tonight due to their ability.

characters.name: Exorcist
characters.description: Each night*, choose a player (different to last night): the Demon, if chosen, learns who you are then doesn't wake tonight.

characters.name: Innkeeper
characters.description: Each night*, choose 2 players: they can't die tonight, but 1 is drunk until dusk.

characters.name: Gambler
characters.description: Each night*, choose a player & guess their character: if you guess wrong, you die.

characters.name: Gossip
characters.description: Each day, you may make a public statement. Tonight, if it was true, a player dies.

characters.name: Courtier
characters.description: Once per game, at night, choose a character: they are drunk for 3 nights & 3 days.

characters.name: Professor
characters.description: Once per game, at night*, choose a dead player: if they are a Townsfolk, they are resurrected.

characters.name: Minstrel
characters.description: When a Minion dies by execution, all other players (except Travellers) are drunk until dusk tomorrow.

characters.name: Tea Lady
characters.description: If both your alive neighbors are good, they can't die.

characters.name: Pacifist
characters.description: Executed good players might not die.

characters.name: Fool
characters.description: The 1st time you die, you don't.

characters.name: Tinker
characters.description: You might die at any time.

characters.name: Moonchild
characters.description: When you learn that you died, publicly choose 1 alive player. Tonight, if it was a good player, they die.

characters.name: Goon
characters.description: Each night, the 1st player to choose you with their ability is drunk until dusk. You become their alignment.

characters.name: Lunatic
characters.description: You think you are a Demon, but you are not. The Demon knows who you are & who you choose at night.

characters.name: Godfather
characters.description: You start knowing which Outsiders are in play. If 1 died today, choose a player tonight: they die. [-1 or +1 Outsider]

characters.name: Devil's Advocate
characters.description: Each night, choose a living player (different to last night): if executed tomorrow, they don't die.

characters.name: Assassin
characters.description: Once per game, at night*, choose a player: they die, even if for some reason they could not.

characters.name: Mastermind
characters.description: If the Demon dies by execution (ending the game), play for 1 more day. If a player is then executed, their team loses.

characters.name: Zombuul
characters.description: Each night*, if no-one died today, choose a player: they die. The 1st time you die, you live but register as dead.

characters.name: Pukka
characters.description: Each night, choose a player: they are poisoned. The previously poisoned player dies then becomes healthy.

characters.name: Shabaloth
characters.description: Each night*, choose 2 players: they die. A dead player you chose last night might be regurgitated.

characters.name: Po
characters.description: Each night*, you may choose a player: they die. If your last choice was no-one, choose 3 players tonight.

first_night_steps.name: Dusk
first_night_steps.description: Check that all eyes are closed. Some Travellers & Fabled act.

first_night_steps.name: Minion Info
first_night_steps.description: If there are 7 or more players, wake all Minions: Show the THIS IS THE DEMON token. Point to the Demon.

first_night_steps.name: Lunatic
first_night_steps.description: If there are 7 or more players, show the Lunatic THESE ARE YOUR MINIONS (point to the bluff 'Minions') and three bluffs, then put them to sleep. Wake the real Demon, show YOU ARE and the Demon token, then show THIS PLAYER IS the Lunatic and point to the Lunatic.

first_night_steps.name: Demon Info
first_night_steps.description: If there are 7 or more players, wake the Demon: Show the THESE ARE YOUR MINIONS token. Point to all Minions. Show the THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY token. Show 3 not-in-play good character tokens.

first_night_steps.name: Sailor
first_night_steps.description: The Sailor points to a living player. Either the Sailor or that player is drunk.

first_night_steps.name: Courtier
first_night_steps.description: The Courtier either signals 'no', or points to a character on the sheet. If used and that character is in play, that player is drunk.

first_night_steps.name: Godfather
first_night_steps.description: Show the Godfather each Outsider token in play.

first_night_steps.name: Devil's Advocate
first_night_steps.description: The Devil's Advocate points to a living player. That player survives execution tomorrow.

first_night_steps.name: Pukka
first_night_steps.description: The Pukka points to a player. That player is poisoned.

first_night_steps.name: Grandmother
first_night_steps.description: Show the Grandmother the marked character token and point to the marked player.

first_night_steps.name: Chambermaid
first_night_steps.description: The Chambermaid points to two players. Show the number signal (0, 1, 2, ...) for how many of them wake tonight for their ability.

first_night_steps.name: Dawn
first_night_steps.description: Wait a few seconds. Call for eyes open.

other_night_steps.name: Dusk
other_night_steps.description: Check that all eyes are closed. Some Travellers & Fabled act.

other_night_steps.name: Sailor
other_night_steps.description: The previously drunk player is no longer drunk. The Sailor points to a living player; either the Sailor or that player is drunk.

other_night_steps.name: Courtier
other_night_steps.description: Reduce the remaining days the marked player is poisoned. If the Courtier has not yet used their ability, they either signal 'no' or point to a character on the sheet; if used and that character is in play, that player is drunk.

other_night_steps.name: Innkeeper
other_night_steps.description: The Innkeeper points to two players; both are safe from the Demon tonight, but one is drunk.

other_night_steps.name: Gambler
other_night_steps.description: The Gambler points to a player and guesses a character. If wrong, the Gambler dies.

other_night_steps.name: Devil's Advocate
other_night_steps.description: The Devil's Advocate points to a living player, different from the previous night. That player survives execution tomorrow.

other_night_steps.name: Lunatic
other_night_steps.description: Do whatever is needed to simulate the Demon for the Lunatic.

other_night_steps.name: Exorcist
other_night_steps.description: The Exorcist points to a player, different from the previous night. If it is the Demon, wake the Demon and show THIS PLAYER IS the Exorcist; the Demon does not act tonight.

other_night_steps.name: Zombuul
other_night_steps.description: If no-one died during the day, the Zombuul points to a player. That player dies.

other_night_steps.name: Pukka
other_night_steps.description: The Pukka points to a player; that player is poisoned. The previously poisoned player dies.

other_night_steps.name: Shabaloth
other_night_steps.description: A player the Shabaloth chose the previous night might be resurrected. The Shabaloth points to two players; those players die.

other_night_steps.name: Po
other_night_steps.description: If the Po chose no-one the previous night, the Po points to three players. Otherwise the Po either signals 'no', or points to one player. Chosen players die.

other_night_steps.name: Assassin
other_night_steps.description: If the Assassin has not yet used their ability, they either signal 'no', or point to a player. That player dies.

other_night_steps.name: Godfather
other_night_steps.description: If an Outsider died today, the Godfather points to a player. That player dies.

other_night_steps.name: Gossip
other_night_steps.description: If the Gossip's public statement was true, choose a player not protected from dying tonight. That player dies.

other_night_steps.name: Professor
other_night_steps.description: If the Professor has not used their ability, they either shake 'no', or point to a player; if that player is a Townsfolk, they are resurrected.

other_night_steps.name: Tinker
other_night_steps.description: The Tinker might die.

other_night_steps.name: Moonchild
other_night_steps.description: If the Moonchild used their ability to target a player today and that player is good, they die.

other_night_steps.name: Grandmother
other_night_steps.description: If the Grandmother's grandchild was killed by the Demon tonight, the Grandmother dies.

other_night_steps.name: Chambermaid
other_night_steps.description: The Chambermaid points to two players. Show the number signal (0, 1, 2, ...) for how many of them wake tonight for their ability.

other_night_steps.name: Dawn
other_night_steps.description: Wait a few seconds. Call for eyes open & immediately say who died.
